SEARCH
Package com.bencodez.simpleapi.time

Class ParsedDuration

java.lang.Object
com.bencodez.simpleapi.time.ParsedDuration
public final class ParsedDuration extends Object
Parsed duration stored as fixed milliseconds. Supported formats (case-insensitive): - 5000ms - 60s - 30m - 12h - 1d - 2w - 1mo (treated as a fixed 30 days) - Combined tokens: 1h30m, 2d12h, 1w2d3h4m5s6ms - ISO-8601 durations such as PT30M, PT12H, P1D - Plain number such as "30" using a configurable default unit This class stores durations as fixed milliseconds.

    ParsedDuration.DurationFormatLabels
    Label container used for formatting durations.
